questions.question: What is the purpose of rootMargin: '200px' in the IntersectionObserver config for infinite scroll?
options: It adds 200px of padding to the scroll container
It triggers loading 200px before the sentinel becomes visible
It prevents loading until the user scrolls 200px past the sentinel
It sets the minimum height of the sentinel element

questions.question: How does the basic infinite scroll implementation determine there are no more pages to load?
options: The API returns a null nextPage field
The fetched array length is less than the expected page size
A dedicated hasMore boolean is returned by the API
The response status code is 204 No Content

questions.question: Why should you combine infinite scroll with list virtualization for very long lists?
options: Infinite scroll alone cannot handle cursor-based pagination
All loaded items stay in the DOM causing performance issues over time
IntersectionObserver stops working when too many items are rendered
Virtualization is required for the sentinel element to function correctly
